backend/main.mo: Motoko actor that manages GPS unit weekly report entries using a Map, exposing create, update, get, and getAll operations keyed by unitId+weekYear.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented feature IDs (CSV parser format detection, metadata extraction, packet counting, GPS fix counting) to their corresponding source files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries of all frontend source files, serving as a reference index for the project's frontend components, pages, hooks, and utilities.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes including background, foreground, chart, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Vite/React app titled 'Runtest Report Automation' that mounts the React root at the #root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with three routes (dashboard, entry, report) wrapped in a Layout, plus a Sonner Toaster for notifications.
frontend/src/components/CSVImportSection: File import UI component supporting paste and file-upload modes for CSV/Excel files, parsing them via csvParser utilities and displaying a FileSummaryCard with extracted metadata and aggregated packet stats per file before import.
frontend/src/components/DataEntryForm.ts: Manual bulk data entry form with model/week selectors, a dynamic validated row table for unit packet data, and upsert submission with per-row error feedback and toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Defines the main app shell with a sticky header (logo + nav links), a main content area, and a footer. Uses TanStack Router for navigation and highlights the active route.
frontend/src/components/ModelSummaryCard: Displays a summary card for a specific GPS unit model showing unit count, total/stored/valid GPS packets, and GPS fix/stored percentage progress bars with model-specific accent colors.
frontend/src/components/ReportFilters.ts: Renders filter controls (week navigator and model selector) for the report view and provides a CSV export function that downloads filtered entries with a totals row.
frontend/src/components/WeeklyReportTabl: Renders a sortable table of report entries filtered by week and model, showing packet stats and color-coded GPS fix percentage badges, with a totals footer row.
frontend/src/components/WeekNavigator.ts: A week navigation control with previous/next buttons and a centered week label, optionally constrained to a list of available weeks.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) based on the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status using DFINITY's AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching and mutating GPS report data (getAllReports, getReport, createReport, updateReport, upsertReport), plus utility functions for ISO week label manipulation and UnitModel constants.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Inter and JetBrains Mono fonts, sets up a dark navy/amber Tailwind CSS theme via CSS custom properties, and defines reusable component utility classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Dashboard page that displays a week-navigable summary of GPS unit performance, including aggregate stats (total units, packets, GPS fix rate) and per-model summary cards.
frontend/src/pages/DataEntryPage.tsx: Data entry page that provides both a CSV import section and a manual multi-row form for submitting weekly GPS packet data per unit.
frontend/src/pages/ReportPage.tsx: Report page that displays a filterable, week-scoped table of GPS unit packet data with model and week filter controls.
frontend/src/utils/csvParser.ts: CSV/Excel parsing utility that dynamically loads SheetJS from CDN, extracts file metadata (gateway name, date range) from header rows, and parses both Waggle portal export format and legacy GPS packet data formats into structured row objects.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom color palettes (navy, amber, sidebar, chart), custom fonts (Inter, JetBrains Mono), and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file describing a dashboard tool that parses uploaded CSV/Excel files to extract gateway details, packet counts (PktState column), and GPS fix status (GPS Status column), with known issues and existing feature records.
